name: Kashtira Big Bang
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六世壊根清浄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クシャトリラ・ビッグバン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a "Kashtira" Xyz Monster is on the field and a player controls 2 or more monsters: They must banish monsters they control, face-down, so they only control 1 monster. If this card is banished: You can target 1 "Kashtira" Xyz Monster you control; add 1 of your "Kashtira" monsters attached to it to your hand, then you can Special Summon that monster from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Kashtira Big Bang" once per turn.
eff: If a "Kashtira" Xyz Monster is on the field and a player controls 2 or more monsters: They must banish monsters they control, face-down, so they only control 1 monster. If this card is banished: You can target 1 "Kashtira" Xyz Monster you control; add 1 of your "Kashtira" monsters attached to it to your hand, then you can Special Summon that monster from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Kashtira Big Bang" once per turn.

action: Adds Xyz Materials to the hand
banished: Makes the player banish from the field
Makes the opponent banish from the field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
